_meta.description: Biblical chronological data - durations, reigns, lifespans, and periods as recorded in scripture
_meta.note: All durations sourced from explicit biblical statements. Dates are scholarly estimates where provided.

pre_flood.name: Enoch
pre_flood.notes: Did not die - God took him

post_flood.name: Peleg
post_flood.notes: In his days the earth was divided

united_kingdom.name: Saul
united_kingdom.notes: Reign length from NT; 1 Sam 13:1 text unclear

periods.name: Creation to Flood
periods.calculation: Sum of ages from Adam to Noah at flood (Adam 130 + Seth 105 + Enosh 90 + Kenan 70 + Mahalalel 65 + Jared 162 + Enoch 65 + Methuselah 187 + Lamech 182 + Noah 600)

total_in_ark.calculation: From Gen.7.11 (2/17) to Gen.8.14 (2/27 next year)

periods.name: Flood to Abraham's Call
periods.calculation: Sum of ages from Shem to Terah plus Abraham's age at call (75)

periods.name: Patriarchal Period
periods.calculation: From Abraham's call (75) to Jacob entering Egypt (130): Abraham 100 years to Isaac, Isaac 60 to Jacob, Jacob 130 entering Egypt = 100-75 + 60 + 130 = 215

periods.name: Egyptian Sojourn
periods.notes: Exodus 12:40 states 430 years; Galatians 3:17 counts from promise to law

periods.name: Conquest of Canaan
periods.calculation: Joshua's age calculations: entered at ~79, died at 110, approximately 7 years of conquest
periods.notes: Caleb was 40 at spying, 85 at division of land after conquest

periods.name: Period of Judges
periods.notes: Acts 13:20 gives approximately 450 years; individual judge periods total differently due to overlaps

periods.name: Divided Kingdom
periods.calculation: From division (930 BC) to fall of Israel (722 BC)

periods.name: Judah Alone
periods.calculation: From fall of Israel (722 BC) to fall of Jerusalem (586 BC)

periods.name: Babylonian Exile
periods.notes: Jeremiah prophesied 70 years; ended with temple completion

periods.name: Persian Period
periods.notes: From Cyrus's decree to Alexander's conquest

periods.name: Intertestamental Period
periods.notes: From Malachi to birth of Christ; no biblical record

periods.name: Jesus's Ministry
periods.notes: Based on three Passovers mentioned in John's Gospel

old_testament.name: Abraham's Stay in Haran
old_testament.notes: Left at Terah's death when Abraham was 75

old_testament.name: Moses in Midian
old_testament.notes: Fled Egypt at 40, called at burning bush at 80

old_testament.name: Plagues on Egypt
old_testament.notes: Duration not specified; rapid succession implied

old_testament.name: Mount Sinai Encampment
old_testament.notes: Arrived 3rd month after leaving Egypt, departed 2/20 of year 2

old_testament.name: Balaam's Journey
old_testament.notes: Duration not specified

old_testament.name: Absalom's Conspiracy Preparation
old_testament.notes: Some manuscripts read 40 years

old_testament.name: Siege of Samaria (Ben-hadad)
old_testament.notes: Duration not specified

old_testament.name: Siege of Samaria (Famine)
old_testament.notes: Duration not specified

old_testament.name: Manasseh in Babylon
old_testament.notes: Duration not specified; returned and restored

old_testament.name: Ezekiel's Symbolic Lying
old_testament.notes: 390 days for Israel's sin, 40 for Judah's

old_testament.name: Second Temple Construction
old_testament.notes: Resumed under Darius, completed in his 6th year

old_testament.name: Jacob's Service for Rachel
old_testament.notes: Served Laban 7 years for Rachel, received Leah instead

old_testament.name: Jacob's Service for Rachel (Second)
old_testament.notes: Served 7 more years after receiving Rachel

old_testament.name: Jacob's Service for Flocks
old_testament.notes: 6 years tending Laban's flocks after 14 years for wives

old_testament.name: Joseph in Prison
old_testament.notes: Minimum 2 years; cupbearer forgot him for 2 full years after interpretation

old_testament.name: Moses in Pharaoh's Court
old_testament.notes: From adoption to flight at age 40

old_testament.name: Tabernacle Erected
old_testament.date_note: First day of first month, second year
old_testament.notes: Exactly one year after leaving Egypt

old_testament.name: Miriam's Exclusion from Camp
old_testament.notes: Shut outside the camp for leprosy after speaking against Moses

old_testament.name: Israel at Kadesh-barnea
old_testament.notes: Remained many days; spies sent from here

old_testament.name: Korah's Rebellion
old_testament.notes: Duration not specified; earth swallowed rebels

old_testament.name: Israel Circling Mount Seir
old_testament.notes: From Kadesh-barnea until crossing the brook Zered

old_testament.name: Jordan River Crossing
old_testament.notes: Crossed on 10th day of first month; waters stopped at Adam

old_testament.name: Circumcision at Gilgal
old_testament.notes: Second generation circumcised before Passover

old_testament.name: Sun Standing Still at Gibeon
old_testament.notes: Sun stopped about a whole day

old_testament.name: Shamgar as Judge
old_testament.notes: Duration not specified; killed 600 Philistines

old_testament.name: Goliath's Challenge
old_testament.notes: Defied Israel morning and evening for 40 days

old_testament.name: David's Flight from Saul
old_testament.notes: Approximate; David was ~20 at Goliath, king at 30

old_testament.name: David in Philistine Territory
old_testament.notes: A year and four months with Achish of Gath

old_testament.name: David's Census Plague
old_testament.notes: 70,000 died; stopped at threshing floor of Araunah

old_testament.name: Drought in Elijah's Time
old_testament.notes: Three years and six months with no rain

old_testament.name: Elijah at Brook Cherith
old_testament.notes: Duration not specified; until brook dried up

old_testament.name: Elijah at Zarephath
old_testament.notes: Duration not specified; widow's oil and flour did not run out

old_testament.name: Siege of Jerusalem (First Babylonian)
old_testament.notes: Jehoiachin surrendered; first deportation

old_testament.name: Gedaliah's Governorship
old_testament.notes: Duration not specified; assassinated by Ishmael

old_testament.name: Ezra's Journey from Babylon
old_testament.notes: Left Babylon on 1st of 1st month, arrived on 1st of 5th month

old_testament.name: Ezra's Mourning over Intermarriage
old_testament.notes: Resolution took from 9th month to 1st month (3 months)

old_testament.name: Purim Celebration Established
old_testament.notes: 14th and 15th of Adar

old_testament.name: Nebuchadnezzar's Madness
old_testament.notes: Seven periods of time (likely years); lived like an animal

old_testament.name: Daniel in the Lions' Den
old_testament.notes: From evening to dawn

old_testament.name: Shadrach, Meshach, Abednego in Furnace
old_testament.notes: Brief; emerged unharmed with no smell of fire

old_testament.name: Ezekiel's Silence
old_testament.notes: Could only speak when God opened his mouth; ended at fall of Jerusalem

old_testament.name: Hosea's Marriage to Gomer
old_testament.notes: Duration not specified; prophetic symbol of God and Israel

old_testament.name: Isaiah Walking Naked
old_testament.notes: Three years as a sign against Egypt and Cush

new_testament.name: Paul in Ephesus
new_testament.notes: 2 years in hall of Tyrannus + additional time

new_testament.name: Flight to Egypt
new_testament.notes: Duration not specified; until death of Herod

new_testament.name: Transfiguration
new_testament.notes: Six days (Matthew/Mark) or about eight days (Luke) after Peter's confession

new_testament.name: Last Supper to Arrest
new_testament.notes: Same night; Passover evening to garden of Gethsemane

new_testament.name: Crucifixion Duration
new_testament.notes: Third hour (9 AM) to ninth hour (3 PM)

new_testament.name: Darkness during Crucifixion
new_testament.notes: Sixth hour to ninth hour (noon to 3 PM)

new_testament.name: Peter's Imprisonment and Release
new_testament.notes: During Passover week; released by angel at night

new_testament.name: Paul in Thessalonica
new_testament.notes: Three Sabbaths reasoning in the synagogue

new_testament.name: Paul before Gallio
new_testament.notes: Gallio inscription provides key chronological anchor

new_testament.name: Waiting for the Spirit at Pentecost
new_testament.notes: Ascension at 40 days, Pentecost at 50 days after resurrection

paul_missionary.name: First Missionary Journey
paul_missionary.route: Antioch → Seleucia → Cyprus (Salamis, Paphos) → Perga → Pisidian Antioch → Iconium → Lystra → Derbe → Return

paul_missionary.name: Second Missionary Journey
paul_missionary.route: Antioch → Syria/Cilicia → Derbe → Lystra → Phrygia/Galatia → Troas → Philippi → Thessalonica → Berea → Athens → Corinth (18 months) → Ephesus → Caesarea → Antioch

paul_missionary.name: Third Missionary Journey
paul_missionary.route: Antioch → Galatia/Phrygia → Ephesus (3 years) → Macedonia → Greece → Macedonia → Troas → Miletus → Tyre → Caesarea → Jerusalem

paul_missionary.name: Journey to Rome
paul_missionary.route: Caesarea → Sidon → Myra → Fair Havens → Malta (shipwreck) → Syracuse → Rhegium → Puteoli → Rome

elijah.name: Jezreel to Beersheba to Horeb
elijah.notes: 40 days and 40 nights on the strength of angelic food

ruth.name: Moab to Bethlehem (Return)
ruth.notes: Naomi and Ruth; arrived at beginning of barley harvest

david.name: Bethlehem to Valley of Elah
david.notes: Sent by Jesse to bring food to brothers

david.name: Flight to Moab (Parents)
david.notes: Brought parents to safety with king of Moab

david.name: Wilderness of Ziph/Maon/En-gedi
david.notes: Moved between strongholds while Saul pursued

jesus.name: Bethlehem to Egypt
jesus.notes: Joseph warned in dream; fled Herod

jesus.name: Nazareth to Jerusalem (Age 12)
jesus.notes: Passover pilgrimage; found in temple after 3 days

jesus.name: Final Journey to Jerusalem
jesus.notes: Set his face toward Jerusalem; Luke's travel narrative

building_projects.name: Tabernacle
building_projects.notes: Completed within first year after Exodus

building_projects.name: Solomon's Temple
building_projects.notes: Started in 4th year of Solomon, finished in 11th year

building_projects.name: Second Temple (Zerubbabel)
building_projects.notes: Initial foundation laid earlier; completed in Darius's 6th year

building_projects.name: Hezekiah's Tunnel (Siloam)
building_projects.notes: 533m tunnel cut through bedrock to redirect Gihon Spring into city

building_projects.name: Jeroboam's Shrines at Dan and Bethel
building_projects.notes: Golden calves set up as alternative to Jerusalem temple

building_projects.name: Omri Built Samaria
building_projects.notes: Bought hill of Samaria for 2 talents of silver; made it capital

prophetic_periods.name: Malachi
prophetic_periods.notes: Last OT prophet; 400 years silence follows

prophetic_periods.name: Obadiah
prophetic_periods.notes: Prophecy against Edom for betraying Judah

prophetic_periods.name: Joel
prophetic_periods.notes: Date debated; locust plague and Day of the LORD

prophetic_periods.name: Nahum
active_during: Between fall of Thebes (663 BC) and fall of Nineveh (612 BC)

prophetic_periods.name: Jonah
prophetic_periods.notes: Sent to Nineveh; also prophesied Israel's border restoration

prophetic_periods.name: Huldah
prophetic_periods.notes: Prophetess; confirmed the Book of the Law found in temple

prophetic_periods.name: Deborah
prophetic_periods.notes: Prophetess and judge; judged Israel under the palm tree

samuel.event: Dedicated to the LORD before birth
Called by the LORD at night (est.)
samuel.notes: Age not specified; described as a boy

solomon.notes: Called himself 'a little child' — actual age unknown

violated_sabbaths.notes: 490 years of missed sabbath years = 70 years exile

prophetic_time_markers.name: Daniel's 70 Weeks
prophetic_time_markers.notes: From decree to restore Jerusalem to 'the Anointed One'

prophetic_time_markers.name: Ezekiel's 390 + 40 Days
prophetic_time_markers.notes: 390 days for Israel's sin, 40 for Judah's — one day per year

prophetic_time_markers.name: Daniel's 2,300 Evenings and Mornings
prophetic_time_markers.notes: Until the sanctuary is restored to its rightful state

prophetic_time_markers.name: Daniel's 1,290 Days
prophetic_time_markers.notes: From abolition of regular sacrifice to the abomination

prophetic_time_markers.name: Daniel's 1,335 Days
prophetic_time_markers.notes: Blessed is he who waits and reaches 1,335 days

prophetic_time_markers.name: Isaiah's 65 Years
prophetic_time_markers.notes: Within 65 years Ephraim will be shattered

prophetic_time_markers.name: Revelation's 42 Months
prophetic_time_markers.notes: Nations trample the holy city; beast given authority

prophetic_time_markers.name: Revelation's 1,260 Days
prophetic_time_markers.notes: Two witnesses prophesy; woman protected in wilderness

prophetic_time_markers.name: Revelation's Five Months
prophetic_time_markers.notes: Locusts given power to torment for five months
